overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling grassy hills. The character passes a wooden signpost and an abandoned wagon while tipping his hat, set in a scenic rural landscape with scattered pine trees and partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road at trail intersection with wooden signpost

events.description: character walks past wooden signpost on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland toward the hills

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional arrows at the trail intersection
rolling green hills with scattered rock outcroppings and patches of trees
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside to the left of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grassland, passing a weathered wooden signpost on the right. Rolling green hills rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky, with scattered pine trees visible on the slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching abandoned wagon

events.description: abandoned wooden wagon comes into view on the left side of the trail ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through the valley toward the distant wagon

entered.detail: derelict wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the winding path, an abandoned wooden wagon comes into view on the left side of the trail. The landscape remains open with scattered pine trees and rocky outcroppings visible on the hillsides.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail passing derelict wagon in grassy valley

events.description: character briefly raises right hand to tip his hat while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned wagon while tipping his hat in a greeting gesture

entered.detail: dense cluster of trees marking the trail ahead into the valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the abandoned wagon, moving from close proximity back to distance on the left. At around 44 seconds, the character tips his hat while continuing to walk toward the forested valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail leading into forested valley

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the trail into the increasingly wooded valley ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wagon, the character proceeds down the trail into a more densely forested area. The path continues toward the tree-lined valley as the surrounding vegetation becomes thicker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from open, rolling grasslands into a dense forested valley. It begins with the character walking past a weathered wooden signpost on the right, with green hills and scattered pine trees stretching toward a partly cloudy sky. As the path winds forward, the scene opens up to reveal an abandoned wooden wagon resting among rocky outcroppings on the left. The camera continues to track the character as he passes the wagon and tips his hat, shifting the focus toward the deepening greenery of the horizon. Finally, the trail leads the character away from the open plains and into a more densely forested area where the surrounding vegetation becomes thick and enveloping.
